title: OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER - 211info
text: VENETA WARMING CENTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers overnight shelter when temperatures reach 28 degrees or below. 25133 E Broadway Veneta, OR 97487 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Open when temperatures are 28 degrees or below Email (541) 556-3336 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 556-3336 Main phone Main phone (541) 556-3336 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to check the open status and confirm hours FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located near Veneta City Park. Services: Community Shelters Extreme Weather Shelters Other Services Offered At This Location: VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOLUNTEERING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
